message:
fix: config parser, migration timestamp detection, dead code, formatting

config.rs:
- Refactor strip_inline_comment() to use extract_inline_comment()
  helper instead of manual byte iteration, reducing duplication and
  improving clarity

migrate.rs:
- Hoist table-existence probe before the typeof() query so we skip
  empty/missing tables early and avoid redundant row probes
- Mark columns with all-NULL values as incompatible timestamp schema
  (conservative fallback) instead of silently skipping them

conformance.rs:
- Remove dead `req_id += 1` assignment after the last use of the
  counter in resource_query_router_projects_limit_and_contains_are_honored

messaging.rs:
- Reformat mark_message_read() call site from multi-line to single-line
  to match project style

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
